description: A customer is calling to ask about a new 'Regulatory Recovery Fee' that appeared on their bill.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and locate the new fee on their billing statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the specified fee on the customer's bill.

nodes.task_description: Access the internal knowledge base to find the official explanation for the new fee.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the approved script explaining the government-mandated fee.

nodes.task_description: Clearly explain the purpose of the fee to the customer using the information from the knowledge base.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately and clearly communicates the reason for the new charge.
